message:
🐛 fix: Use correct --print flag for claude-code CLI

Changed from --non-interactive (which doesn't exist) to --print
which is the correct flag for non-interactive output.

Previous error: 'error: unknown option --non-interactive'

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -95,7 +95,7 @@ jobs:
           Please implement the fix now."
 
           # Run Claude Code in non-interactive mode using npx
-          echo "$PROMPT" | npx -y @anthropic-ai/claude-code --non-interactive || true
+          echo "$PROMPT" | npx -y @anthropic-ai/claude-code --print || true
 
       - name: Check for changes
         id: check_changes
